understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete each level by placing all selectable pieces onto goal tiles (marked +) simultaneously, using a limited number of steps. The game is won when all levels are completed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is grid-based with pixel coordinates (3 pixels per cell). Actions MOVE_UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT shift the currently selected piece. Some objects are pushable blocks that move with the piece if adjacent. Walls block movement. Multiple selectable pieces exist; CLICK with target_position switches control to another selectable piece at those coordinates. The player must manage steps efficiently to solve each puzzle.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete each level by placing all selectable pieces onto goal tiles (marked +) simultaneously, using a limited number of steps. The game is won when all levels are completed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is grid-based with pixel coordinates (3 pixels per cell). Actions MOVE_UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT shift the currently selected piece. Some objects are pushable blocks that move with the piece if adjacent. Walls block movement. Multiple selectable pieces exist; CLICK with target_position switches control to another selectable piece at those coordinates. The player must manage steps efficiently to solve each puzzle.
